parameters.query: SELECT id, title_cn, title_vn, author, base_url, source_site FROM novel_registry WHERE title_cn = '{{ $json.novel_name }}' LIMIT 1
SELECT translated_text, chapter_title FROM translation_history WHERE novel_id = {{ $json.id }} AND chapter_number = {{ $('Set Input').first().json.chapter_number }} AND status = 'completed' LIMIT 1

parameters.text:
=⏳ Đang dịch *{{ $('Lookup Novel').first().json.title_vn }}* - Chương {{ $('Set Input').first().json.chapter_number }}...
_Vui lòng chờ 30-60 giây_

parameters.query: SELECT term_cn, term_vn FROM translation_glossary WHERE genre = 'xianxia' ORDER BY LENGTH(term_cn) DESC LIMIT 50

INSERT INTO translation_history (novel_id, chapter_number, chapter_title, source_url, original_text, translated_text, char_count, status) VALUES ({{ $json.novel_id }}, {{ $json.chapter_number }}, '{{ $json.chapter_title }}', '{{ $json.chapter_url }}', '{{ $json.original_text }}', '{{ $json.translated_text }}', {{ $json.char_count }}, 'completed') ON CONFLICT (novel_id, chapter_number) DO UPDATE SET translated_text = EXCLUDED.translated_text, status = 'completed'
